docx_sop.description: 印刷产品(过程、首检)检验作业指导书 FL-QC-015-036
docx_sop.structure_summary: SOP document for printing product inspection. Header table (company/doc number), then sections: 1.目的 (purpose), 2.范围 (scope), 3.职责 (responsibilities), 4.程序 (procedures with sub-steps 4.1 frequency, 4.2 inspection steps including 4.2.1 visual, 4.2.2 dimension, 4.2.3 decolorization tests with 6 sub-tests), 5.异常情况 (abnormal handling), 6.文件记录 (records). Heavily image-rich: 26 images showing inspection photos, test equipment (BLJ-01, LC-103A), and step-by-step test procedures.

gt_chunks.label: 文档基本信息 — 编号/版本/目的/范围
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 0-3. Header table + purpose + scope. Atomic metadata chunk answering 'what is this document about' and 'what equipment does it apply to'.

gt_chunks.label: 职责 — QC当班检验职责
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 4-6. Section 3 responsibilities. Key info: QC issues report, decides go/no-go, nonconforming product must not mix with normal.

gt_chunks.label: 检验频率
gt_chunks.notes: Block 8. Section 4.1. Small but critical — users ask 'how often to inspect?'

gt_chunks.label: 计划单与客签样核对
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 9-11. Section 4.2 heading + first two images. Step: verify plan sheet matches customer-signed sample.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.1 外观检验 — 印刷面颜色/套印/糊版/划痕
gt_chunks.notes: Block 13 + image_refs 14-15. Visual inspection criteria. Users ask 'what defects to check for in printing inspection?'

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.2 印刷尺寸检验 — 直尺色位间距
gt_chunks.notes: Block 16 first sentence. Dimension check using ruler on color position spacing.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.1 3M胶带脱色测试
gt_chunks.notes: Block 16 latter part + blocks 17-22. First decolorization test method using 3M tape adhesion. 6 images showing tape application.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.2 印刷层干摩擦检验
gt_chunks.notes: Block 23 + blocks 24-25. Dry rub test for print layer decolorization.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.3 印刷层湿摩擦检验
gt_chunks.notes: Block 26 + blocks 27-30. Wet rub test — similar to dry but with moisture. Images show wet tissue application.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.4 颜色偏差检验 — 色差仪
gt_chunks.notes: Block 31 + blocks 32-35. Color deviation measurement. Image shows handheld colorimeter with dB/ΔE readings (65.97, -11.84, 30.97).

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.5 印刷层颜色玻璃测试 — BLJ-01圆盘剥离试验机
gt_chunks.notes: Block 36 + blocks 37-44 (8 images). References external SOP 'BLJ-01圆盘剥离试验机作业指导书'. Equipment photos include BL-01 machine.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2.3.6 印刷表层干摩擦测试(仪器) — LC-103A耐磨试验机
gt_chunks.notes: Block 45 + blocks 46-51. Instrument-based friction test. Images show rub tester with counter (0000), 20N/4.5LBS test fixture.

gt_chunks.label: 异常情况及措施 — 不合格品处理
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 52-53. Section 5. Key policy: QC has authority to halt production immediately on abnormal findings.

gt_chunks.label: 文件及记录清单
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 54-57. Section 6. Two required records: inspection record form and nonconformance notice.

sample_queries: 印刷产品检验频率是多少？
外观检验需要检查哪些缺陷？
3M胶带脱色测试怎么做？
干摩擦和湿摩擦检验有什么区别？
颜色偏差检验用什么设备？ΔE标准是什么？
BLJ-01圆盘剥离试验机在哪个步骤使用？
LC-103A耐磨试验机操作步骤是什么？
发现不合格品怎么处理？
印刷过程检验需要填写哪些记录？
QC在印刷检验中的职责是什么？

docx_water.description: 奶茶杯测水试验作业指导书 FL-ZS-WI-002
docx_water.structure_summary: Step-by-step SOP for milk tea cup water leak testing. Structure: 作业准备 (preparation materials list: cups, lids, plugs, tape, towel, water), 作业说明 (test schedule 13:30-15:00 daily), then 5 sequential steps with photos. 9 images: product photos of cups/lids, test procedure photos (soaking, wiping, taping, plugging, assembling, tilting), and a results form screenshot.

gt_chunks.label: 作业准备 — 材料与时间要求
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 0-6. Material prep: each mold cavity 2 sets of cups from production line, split into today-test group and 2-day-aged group. Also need matching lids, plugs, tape, towel, water.

gt_chunks.label: 作业说明 — 测试时间与目的
gt_chunks.notes: Block 7. Daily test window 13:30-15:00. Purpose: test cup-lid assembly for water leakage.

gt_chunks.label: 步骤1 — 泡水与擦干
gt_chunks.notes: Block 8 + blocks 9-10 (2 images). Soak cup/lid contact surfaces in water 2-3 hours, then wipe dry with towel.

gt_chunks.label: 步骤2 — 密封吸管孔与安装盖塞
gt_chunks.notes: Block 11 + blocks 12-14 (3 images). Tape over straw hole on lid, install plug cap. Photos show taping and plug insertion.

gt_chunks.label: 步骤3 — 装水90%并安装杯盖(交叉配套)
gt_chunks.notes: Block 15 + blocks 16-17 (2 images). Fill cup 90%, attach lid. KEY: soaked cups must cross-match with 2-day-aged lids from the bin (交叉配套).

gt_chunks.label: 步骤4 — 斜放70°旋转360°漏水测试
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 18-19. Tilt cup 70°, rotate 360° clockwise or counter-clockwise to check for leaks. Repeat for every mold cavity.

gt_chunks.label: 步骤5 — 整理漏水记录并报告
gt_chunks.notes: Block 20 + blocks 21-22 (2 images). Compile leak test records into Excel table and send to 林剑. Image shows form with columns: 编号/杯盖/奶茶杯腔号/型号.

sample_queries: 奶茶杯测水试验每天什么时间做？
测水试验需要准备哪些材料？
泡水时间是多久？
吸管孔怎么密封？
装水量是多少？
什么是交叉配套？为什么要这样做？
漏水测试的旋转角度是多少？
漏水记录发给谁？
每个模腔需要几组杯子？
奶茶杯和杯盖怎么配对测试？

docx_qc.description: 标签日期确认管理规范 FL-QC-015-016
docx_qc.structure_summary: 5-page management specification for label date confirmation. Structure: 目的 (purpose), 适用范围 (scope covering all domestic customer labels), 职责范围 (6 departments: 品技中心/采购部/内销部/品质部/PMC部/生产车间/信息部), 四.流程和要求 (22 numbered procedural rules covering label design→procurement→verification→printing→storage→usage→disposal lifecycle), 其它说明 (training requirements). 10 images showing label examples (纸箱标签, 不干胶标签, 内袋标签) from 百胜/Pizza Hut products with date stamps. Has page-header tables on each page.

gt_chunks.label: 文档基本信息 — 目的与适用范围
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 0-4. Purpose: ensure correct use of product labels and batch dates. Scope: all domestic customer labels including cartons, inner bags, stickers — covering confirmation, procurement, acceptance, printing, storage, use, and disposal.

gt_chunks.label: 职责分工 — 7个部门职责
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 5-12. Seven departments with distinct responsibilities. Critical: 品质部 owns label content review, acceptance, daily monitoring, sticker storage, date printing, distribution tracking, and defect records.

gt_chunks.label: 流程1-4 — 标签设计→采购→到货→验收
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 14-19. Label lifecycle start: design by purchasing, confirm with sales+QC+customer, signed sample locked for safekeeping (丢失考核重罚=loss severely penalized). Arrival inspection by QC against drawing specs.

gt_chunks.label: 流程5a — 纸箱标签盖章印刷
expected_images: 纸箱外包装标签含生产日期
gt_chunks.notes: Block 21. Carton labels: use stamping method. Production leader sets stamp, operator stamps, self-inspects, then QC does first-piece inspection per Figure 1 criteria.

gt_chunks.label: 流程5b — 不干胶标签打印机管理
gt_chunks.notes: Block 22. Sticker labels: dedicated QC printer, auto-calculated shelf life, password-protected computer (change every 3 months), USB backup, first-piece + last-piece verification, dual-person sign-off. Most detailed and security-critical section.

gt_chunks.label: 流程5c — 内袋喷码管理
gt_chunks.notes: Block 23. Inner bag labels: inkjet coding by maintenance staff only, shelf life auto-generated, no other personnel may set. First piece confirmed by leader + QC.

gt_chunks.label: 流程6-8 — 万年历/日期尺寸/留样要求
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 24-27. Mandatory auto-date calendar at stations. Yum!/百胜 size specs: outer box ≥1.5cm, inner label ≥4mm. Samples must be pasted on inspection records with 3-party signatures.

gt_chunks.label: 流程9-11 — 停机/交接/入库确认
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 28-30. Process disruption handling: distinguish partial/complete/labeled/unlabeled items. Successor must re-verify dates. Pre-warehousing and pre-shipment double-check.

gt_chunks.label: 流程12-14 — 批次完工保存与数量核对
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 31-33. Batch completion: work instructions kept by leader, inspection records by QC supervisor, 3-year retention. Each batch ≥1 sample. Label count reconciliation mandatory — discrepancy requires immediate escalation.

gt_chunks.label: 流程15-17 — 不合格标签处置与仓库安全
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 34-38. Defective labels go into locked one-way container. Label warehouse is controlled area with surveillance, no unauthorized access, no chemicals/corrosives, no pest evidence. Weekly audit by designated QC person. 2-year record retention for disposals.

gt_chunks.label: 流程18-22 — 变更管理/试验/培训/百胜执行
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 38-46. Label material/method changes need QC+sales review, first-order monitoring. Experiments in warehouse need area planning and scrap accountability. Design changes communicated via internal memo with effective date and inventory disposition.

gt_chunks.label: 图示 — 标签检验要点示例(图1/2/3)
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 47-71 (image_refs) + assets. Images show actual label examples: carton labels with date stamps, Pizza Hut/百胜 product labels (餐具套件, 快热到家), PP cup labels with full compliance info. These are the referenced Figures 1/2/3 in the text.

sample_queries: 标签设计需要哪些部门审批？
不干胶标签打印密码多久更换一次？
纸箱标签日期怎么印刷？
百胜产品的标签日期尺寸要求是什么？
标签签样丢失了怎么办？
内袋喷码由谁负责设置？
不合格标签怎么处理？
标签仓库有什么管理要求？
标签变更时需要通知哪些部门？
标签相关记录保存多久？
打印格式文件如何备份？
谁有权限修改内袋喷码日期？

docx_manual.description: 富岭U8+财务部操作手册 UF_U8130_FLCW_18_04
docx_manual.structure_summary: Comprehensive ERP (Yonyou U8+) finance department operations manual with 6 chapters: Ch1 应付款管理 (accounts payable: purchase invoice entry/review, other payable docs, payment entry, transfers, cancellations, payable notes), Ch2 应收款管理 (accounts receivable: sales invoice review, other receivable docs, receipt entry, domestic sales billing, transfers, cancellations, receivable notes), Ch3 存货核算/成本 (inventory accounting: prerequisites, journalizing steps including provisional cost/settlement/special docs/normal docs/product cost/period-end, voucher generation for various doc types), Ch4 固定资产 (fixed assets: original cards, additions, disposals, changes, depreciation, batch vouchers), Ch5 总账模块 (general ledger: voucher entry/review/posting, auto-transfer/period-end P&L, reconciliation, closing), Ch6 UFO报表 (UFO reports). Each section follows pattern: system path table → step tables (步骤/操作/结果) → screenshots. 163 assets, overwhelmingly step_screenshots of U8 ERP interface, with 31 routed to vector and 132 routed to text (text-heavy screenshots with OCR).

gt_chunks.label: 文档元数据 — 编号/日期/文档说明
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 0-10. Document metadata: established 2018-04-01, doc control no. UF_U8130_FLCW_18_04, purpose is ERP training manual for system operations.

gt_chunks.label: 目录 — 章节总览
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 11-65. Table of contents spanning 6 chapters. Useful for navigation queries like 'what does this manual cover?'

gt_chunks.label: 1.1 采购发票录入 — 普通/专用发票选择与8步操作
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 67-84. System path: 业务导航→供应链→采购管理→采购发票. 8 steps with screenshots. Critical note: 当月结算=发票金额回写入库单; 跨月结算=生成红蓝字回冲单.

gt_chunks.label: 1.2 采购发票审核 — 6步审核与制单
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 85-97. System path: 应付款管理→应付处理→采购发票审核. 6 steps: query→select→detail→review→auto-voucher→save.

gt_chunks.label: 1.3 其他应付单据录入
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 98-103. Explains two sources of AP docs: auto from purchase invoice + manual entry for others.

gt_chunks.label: 1.4 付款单据录入 — 5步付款与凭证生成
gt_chunks.notes: Blocks 104-113. System path: 应付款管理→付款处理→付款单据录入. 5 steps from entry to auto-voucher.

gt_chunks.label: 1.5 转账 — 应付款核销流程
gt_chunks.notes: Section 1.5. Explains AP transfer/write-off operations between invoices and payments.

gt_chunks.label: 1.6 取消操作 — 应付反操作步骤
gt_chunks.notes: Section 1.6. Reversal procedures: un-approve, un-settle, un-match, delete. Critical for error correction.

gt_chunks.label: 1.7 应付票据 — 票据管理全流程
gt_chunks.notes: Section 1.7. Covers AP notes lifecycle: issuance, acceptance, discount, endorsement.

gt_chunks.label: 2.1 销售发票审核
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.1. AR side: review sales invoices.

gt_chunks.label: 2.2 其他应收单据录入
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.2. Manual entry of other AR documents.

gt_chunks.label: 2.4 收款单据录入
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.4. Receipt entry — mirror of payment entry on AP side.

gt_chunks.label: 2.5 内销销售开票 — 完整开票流程
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.5. Domestic sales billing: query delivery docs → generate sales invoice. Likely the most used section.

gt_chunks.label: 2.6 转账(应收核销)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.6. AR side transfer/write-off.

gt_chunks.label: 2.7 取消操作(应收)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.7. AR reversal procedures.

gt_chunks.label: 2.8 应收票据管理
gt_chunks.notes: Section 2.8. AR notes: receipt, endorsement transfer.

gt_chunks.label: 3.1 存货核算处理前提
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.1. Prerequisites before inventory accounting can run.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.1 暂估成本录入
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.1. Provisional cost entry for goods received before invoice.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.2 结算成本处理
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.2. Settlement cost processing — links invoice to receipt.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.3 特殊单据记账
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.3. Special document journalizing.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.4 正常单据记账(材料部分)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.4. Normal material document journalizing.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.5 产品成本报表查询
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.5. Product cost report query.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.6 产品成本分配(产品部分)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.6. Product cost allocation.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.6 产成品正常单据记账(产品部分)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.6 (second). Finished goods journalizing.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.7 期末处理(产品部分)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.7. Period-end processing for finished goods.

gt_chunks.label: 3.2.8 存货核算生成凭证
gt_chunks.notes: Section 3.2.8. Auto-generate vouchers from inventory accounting.

gt_chunks.label: 3.3 存货核算凭证生成(按单据类型)
gt_chunks.notes: Sections 3.3.1-3.3.6. Voucher generation by document type: provisional reversal (red/blue), purchase receipt, material issue, finished goods receipt, sales shipment. Each has specific accounting entries.

gt_chunks.label: 4.1 固定资产应用流程概览
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.1. Fixed asset module workflow overview.

gt_chunks.label: 4.2 原始卡片录入
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.2. Initial card entry for existing fixed assets.

gt_chunks.label: 4.3 资产增加
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.3. New asset acquisition entry.

gt_chunks.label: 4.4 资产减少
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.4. Asset disposal/retirement.

gt_chunks.label: 4.5 资产变动
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.5. Asset changes (department transfer, etc.).

gt_chunks.label: 4.6 计提本月折旧
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.6. Monthly depreciation calculation.

gt_chunks.label: 4.7 批量制单
gt_chunks.notes: Section 4.7. Batch voucher generation for fixed assets.

gt_chunks.label: 5.1 填制凭证
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.1. Manual voucher entry in GL module.

gt_chunks.label: 5.2 审核凭证
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.2. Voucher review/approval in GL.

gt_chunks.label: 5.3 记账
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.3. Posting approved vouchers to general ledger.

gt_chunks.label: 5.4 自动转账(期间损益结转)
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.4. Auto-transfer for period-end P&L closing entries.

gt_chunks.label: 5.5 对账
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.5. Account reconciliation between sub-ledgers.

gt_chunks.label: 5.6 结账
gt_chunks.notes: Section 5.6. Period-end closing — final step in monthly cycle.

gt_chunks.label: 6.1 UFO报表基本流程
gt_chunks.notes: Section 6.1. Overview of UFO reporting module workflow.

gt_chunks.label: 6.2 生成报表
gt_chunks.notes: Section 6.2. Generate standard financial reports (balance sheet, income statement).

gt_chunks.label: 6.3 生成其他报表
gt_chunks.notes: Section 6.3. Custom/other report generation.
